scope.target: Triage AIC-001 through AIC-009 against current repository evidence and create the remediation matrix.
constraints: Dedicated continuation branch and workflow branch metadata were established before material remediation work.

validation: All nine baseline finding IDs have a current status and evidence-backed owner/action

results.summary: Triaged all nine baseline findings against current evidence and created reports/02-remediation-report.md with dispositions, owners, decisions, batches, validation, and deferrals.
